input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.6
            TITLE: starting

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.6: Starting
D.3.6 Starting 
Auxiliary batteries must not be used once a vehicle has moved to the starting line of any 
event.  See IC.8.1

final_answer: Starting Auxiliary batteries must not be used once a vehicle has moved to the starting line of any event. See IC.8.1
